name: Blog Content
description: Read-only public content discovery for Blog, a multilingual static editorial site. All content is freely accessible without authentication, payment, or registration.

access.notes: All public content is freely accessible. The /api and /api/v1 paths referenced in some older discovery files are not implemented in the current deployment. The optional x402 payment gateway is disabled (X402_ENABLED=false in wrangler.jsonc). See auth.md for the full access contract.

skills.name: Blog Content Discovery
skills.description: Find public posts, locale routes, RSS feeds, and machine-readable content indexes.
